title: <div><b>Subject: URGENT: Life-Safety Crisis / Financial Hardship - Request to Vo
content:
Subject: URGENT: Life-Safety Crisis / Financial Hardship - Request to Void $291.32 Charge
Dear Marriel,
I am in a state of emergency. The $291.32 charge on my billing account has triggered a hold on my only debit card. As a displaced, disabled researcher currently in medical recovery, this hold is preventing me from accessing funds for food and basic necessities.
I am requesting an immediate reversal/void of this charge based on two critical factors:
  1. Conflicting Billing Information: My official December PDF Invoice (#[REDACTED:CREDIT CARD]) showed a total of $11.69. I relied on this official document to manage my limited funds. I was unaware that a second "Cost Table" charge of $218.81 for Redis was accruing in the background.
  2. Existing $1,000 Credit: I have $1,000 in active credits for GenAI App Builder (ID: 8272-13FE-764E). I mistakenly believed these credits covered my entire research environment.
The Request: Please manually apply my GenAI credits to cover the $218.81 Redis charge or issue a one-time hardship credit memo to clear the balance. I cannot pay this out-of-pocket first; I need the authorization on my card released for my survival.
context: From document: Subject: URGENT: Life-Safety Crisis / Financial Hardship - Request…
